chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application No. 73 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For orders as to non-prosecution of Reference Applications as notice not issued process fee not paid. -------------- 11.02.2025. None present on behalf of the Applicant nor any intimation received. Matter is pending in non-prosecution since 2018. Accordingly this Reference Application is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz
